codeReview.summary: Reviewed the cache-manager feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and implementation files. The feature correctly introduced a framework-agnostic Repository Protocol and CacheManager covering the required indexes and invalidation behaviors. No high-confidence actionable bugs were found in commit 7f49c52 after accounting for the later duplicate-name fallback fix already landed in 7f94cf1.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The refactor-worker skill says to read dependency files created by previous features, but this feature's transcript shows the worker also needed to read the pre-existing AppState API in src/ui/state.py to ensure the Repository Protocol matched current signatures exactly. The skill should explicitly call out reading the current source-of-truth API file when a feature must mirror an existing interface.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId b7676957-3427-49b5-9d1e-6f3abfe8bc25 includes Read of src/ui/state.py before implementing src/storage/repository.py; refactor-worker SKILL.md Step 1 mentions reading modified files and dependency files but not explicitly the existing interface source that a new Protocol must match.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the cache-manager feature's handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 7f49c52 diff, and the relevant source/test files. Repository Protocol coverage and CacheManager index behavior match the feature requirements, and I found no remaining high-confidence defects in scope.
